text: 2 templates built (budget-tracker $7.99, bookkeeping $9.99), mockups ready for both. Listing blocked by missing ETSY_API_KEY.
Listing pipeline requires ETSY_API_KEY in .env — register at https://www.etsy.com/developers. Without this, zero revenue is possible.
Brain v2.0 upgrade: Priority Engine handles action selection, Claude refines with god-mode deep thinking. Self-evolution enabled.
